# amiOracleAI
> AI Business Forecast & Strategy Companion — dual-engine verified

## What is amiOracleAI?
amiOracleAI is a dual-engine AI strategy companion for founders, executives, and business analysts. Two AI models (Grok + DeepSeek) cross-verify every insight — market analysis, risk scenarios, and financial frameworks you can trust.

## Features
- Market analysis (TAM/SAM/SOM, industry dynamics, segment analysis)
- Competitive intelligence (SWOT, Porter's Five Forces, positioning)
- Risk & scenario planning (best/worst/likely, risk matrices)
- Financial frameworks (unit economics, pricing, revenue models)
- Go-to-market strategy (launch planning, growth levers)
- Decision frameworks (ICE, RICE, build-vs-buy)

## Architecture
- Dual-engine: Grok 4.5 (xAI) + DeepSeek
- Anti-confabulation: trigram-cosine concordance >= 0.45 required
- Stateless: queries processed in real-time, never stored

## Compliance
- EU AI Act (Reg. 2024/1689) Art. 50 — limited-risk, full transparency
- GDPR (Reg. 2016/679) — minimal data, no query storage

## Links
- Website: https://amioracleai.com
- API: https://amioracleai-api-production.up.railway.app
- Contact: hello@amioracleai.com
